title: 120ML Extra Strong Leather Glue, Permanent Clear Washable Adhesive, for Bonding Leather and Different Materials
features: Leather Glue: Specially formulated for bonding a wide range of leather materials, this high-performance leather glue adhesive offers exceptional strength, flexibility, and durability. The leather glue extra strong is resistant to environmental stressors such as UV rays, temperature fluctuations, and humidity changes, ensuring that your bonded leather maintains its quality over time

Multi-purpose: Craft the perfect bond on all leather materials, from furniture to automotive seats, sofas, leather craft, and even faux leather. Whether you're working on a home repair, a creative project, or a professional leather repair, this versatile leather adhesive is the go-to solution for all your leather bonding needs

Glue for Leather Dries Clear: Transparent leather repair glue adheres beautifully without leaving traces, does not penetrate or wrinkle, is transparent after drying, does not turn yellow, and will not affect the beauty of your leather at all. The best leather glue adhesive can be used in direct contact with the skin without soaking or harming the leather, High-Temperature Resistant

Thoughtful Design: hose container + tiny glue outlet. This design is very efficient, the hose can be squeezed at will, and the tiny metal outlet is easy to control the position of the leather glue adhesive application and the size of the glue for leather repair output. Easy to deal with the bonding process

Leather Repair Kits: The glue for leather kits includes 2×60ml leather glue and 1x brush. It's engineered to withstand the demands of daily use, making it perfect for both indoor and outdoor leather applications. Its quick-setting formula and strong adhesion help to minimize repair time and reduce maintenance costs
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page 1 Apply a small, even layer of adhesive to one side of the leather you wish to bond. 2 Apply adhesive to both surfaces with the applicator stick. 3 Allow the adhesive to cure for 1-2 minutes to develop its stickiness by reacting with the air. 4 Press the adhesive-coated surfaces together firmly and maintain pressure. 5 Allow to cure for 24 hours. Next page
